question: What single-letter line item in Part II of the Area Adjustment Worksheet for the simplified method must be completed if the business use area of the home changed during the year or was used for only part of the year?
section_path: Publication 587 Business Use of Your Home — (Including Use by Daycare Providers) — Worksheet To Figure the Deduction for Business Use of Your Home — Simplified Method Worksheet — Area Adjustment Worksheet (for simplified method)
Part II. Area changed during the year or was used for only part of the year.

question: What is required of a taxpayer who chooses the actual cost method for deducting expenses under Publication 463?
gold_answer: The taxpayer must keep records of their actual cost.
section_path: Publication 463 Travel, Gift, and Car Expenses

question: Under what circumstance might the cost of life insurance coverage in a retirement plan be taxable to an individual?
gold_answer: The cost of life insurance coverage included in a retirement plan may have to be included in taxable income if it is considered part of group-term life insurance under fringe benefits rules.
section_path: Your Federal Income Tax For Individuals — TAX GUIDE 2025 — FOR INDIVIDUALS — Your Federal Income Tax For Individuals

question: What type of payment must be reported as income if received by a dependent care provider?
gold_answer: Any amount paid to a dependent care provider must be reported as income.
section_path: Starting a Business and Keeping Records

question: Under what ownership condition is a loss from the sale or disposition of a noncapital asset between a trust fiduciary and a corporation considered nondeductible?
gold_answer: A loss is nondeductible if the trust or the grantor of the trust directly or indirectly owns more than 50% in value of the outstanding stock of the corporation.
section_path: Sales and Other Dispositions of Assets — Foreclosures and Repossessions — Noncapital Assets — Nondeductible Loss
